title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: Fix Tense not increasing damage (and Un-Weak/Un-Vulnerable doing nothing) after the latest Slay the Spire 2 update changed the damage-hook signature; Block was unaffected.
